description: Calculates min, max, avg, and stdDev in linear time.
Processes up to 20k samples against 500 definitions to derive threshold breaches in memory.
Iterates through 500+ tag definitions to group and evaluate live status.
Fetches and processes historical samples up to the limit L (default 200, max 1000).
Retrieves L alerts from Postgres and merges with derived threshold breaches.
State-machine pass over sample series to identify threshold breaches.
Fetches and processes T tags with L samples; generates summaries for LLM consumption.
Regex-based intent classification on user message.
LTTB-like bucket averaging to reduce point count for charts.
Recursive normalization of JSON schemas for Bedrock tool definitions.
Linear mapping and normalization of chat history for Bedrock Converse API.
Linear pass over thousands of telemetry samples to compute statistical summaries.
Multi-round recursive reasoning loop with parallel tool execution.
Orchestrates 7 sequential LLM rounds for full system reporting.
